复合函数微分法

  • 复合函数的偏导数：

    • 定理：设 u=u(x,y),v=v(x,y)u=u(x, y), v=v(x, y)u=u(x,y),v=v(x,y) 在 (x,y)(x, y)(x,y) 可偏导，z=f(u,v)z=f(u, v)z=f(u,v)在相应的 (u,v)(u, v)(u,v) 处可微，则复合函数 z=f(u(x,y),v(x,y))z=f(u(x, y), v(x, y))z=f(u(x,y),v(x,y))在 (x,y)(x, y)(x,y) 处可偏导，且

      ∂z∂x=∂f∂u⋅∂u∂x+∂f∂v⋅∂v∂x,∂z∂y=∂f∂u⋅∂u∂y+∂f∂v⋅∂v∂y\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}, \quad \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial y} ∂x∂z​=∂u∂f​⋅∂x∂u​+∂v∂f​⋅∂x∂v​,∂y∂z​=∂u∂f​⋅∂y∂u​+∂v∂f​⋅∂y∂v​

    • 推广：设向量值函数

      f(u,v)=(f1(u,v)f2(u,v)),g(x,y)=(u(x,y)v(x,y))\boldsymbol{f}(u, v)=\binom{f_1(u, v)}{f_2(u, v)}, \quad \boldsymbol{g}(x, y)=\binom{u(x, y)}{v(x, y)} f(u,v)=(f2​(u,v)f1​(u,v)​),g(x,y)=(v(x,y)u(x,y)​)

      偏导数连续，则 f∘g=(z1(x,y)z2(x,y))\displaystyle \boldsymbol{f} \circ \boldsymbol{g}=\binom{z_1(x, y)}{z_2(x, y)}f∘g=(z2​(x,y)z1​(x,y)​) 的 Jacobi 矩阵

      Df∘g(x,y)= def (∂z1∂x∂z1∂y∂z2∂x∂z2∂y)=(∂f1∂u∂f1∂v∂f2∂u∂f2∂v)(∂u∂x∂u∂y∂v∂x∂v∂y)=Df(u,v)⋅Dg(x,y)\boldsymbol{D}_{\boldsymbol{f} \circ \boldsymbol{g}}(x, y) \stackrel{\text { def }}{=}\left(\begin{array}{ll} \frac{\partial z_1}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial z_1}{\partial y} \\ \frac{\partial z_2}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial z_2}{\partial y} \end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{ll} \frac{\partial f_1}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial f_1}{\partial v} \\ \frac{\partial f_2}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial f_2}{\partial v} \end{array}\right)\left(\begin{array}{ll} \frac{\partial u}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial u}{\partial y} \\ \frac{\partial v}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial v}{\partial y} \end{array}\right)=\boldsymbol{D}_f(u, v) \cdot \boldsymbol{D}_{\boldsymbol{g}}(x, y) Df∘g​(x,y)= def (∂x∂z1​​∂x∂z2​​​∂y∂z1​​∂y∂z2​​​)=(∂u∂f1​​∂u∂f2​​​∂v∂f1​​∂v∂f2​​​)(∂x∂u​∂x∂v​​∂y∂u​∂y∂v​​)=Df​(u,v)⋅Dg​(x,y)

  • 一阶全微分形式的不变性：对于函数 z=f(u,v)z=f(u, v)z=f(u,v) ，无论 u,vu, vu,v 是自变量还是函数，都有

    dz=∂f∂u du+∂f∂v dv\mathrm{d} z=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \mathrm{~d} u+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \mathrm{~d} v dz=∂u∂f​ du+∂v∂f​ dv

高阶偏导数与全微分

  • 高阶偏导数：

    • 定义：f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在某邻域内的偏导数 fx(x,y),fy(x,y)f_x(x, y), f_y(x, y)fx​(x,y),fy​(x,y) 的偏导数称为 fff 的二阶偏导数. 记为

      fxx=∂2f∂x2=∂∂x(∂f∂x),fxy=∂2f∂x∂y=∂∂y(∂f∂x)fyx=∂2f∂y∂x=∂∂x(∂f∂y),fyy=∂2f∂y2=∂∂y(∂f∂y)\begin{aligned} & f_{x x}=\frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial x^2}=\frac{\partial}{\partial x}\left(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\right), f_{x y}=\frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial x \partial y}=\frac{\partial}{\partial y}\left(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\right) \\ & f_{y x}=\frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial y \partial x}=\frac{\partial}{\partial x}\left(\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}\right), f_{y y}=\frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial y^2}=\frac{\partial}{\partial y}\left(\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}\right) \end{aligned} ​fxx​=∂x2∂2f​=∂x∂​(∂x∂f​),fxy​=∂x∂y∂2f​=∂y∂​(∂x∂f​)fyx​=∂y∂x∂2f​=∂x∂​(∂y∂f​),fyy​=∂y2∂2f​=∂y∂​(∂y∂f​)​

    • 定理：若 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 的两个二阶混合偏导数在 (x,y)(x, y)(x,y) 连续，则

      fxy(x,y)=fyx(x,y)f_{x y}(x, y)=f_{y x}(x, y) fxy​(x,y)=fyx​(x,y)

  • 高阶全微分：高阶全微分不再具有形式不变性，如 nnn 阶全微分

    dnz=(∂∂x dx+∂∂y dy)nz=(∑k=0nCnk∂n∂xk∂yn−k dxk dyn−k)z\begin{aligned} \mathrm{d}^n z & =\left(\frac{\partial}{\partial x} \mathrm{~d} x+\frac{\partial}{\partial y} \mathrm{~d} y\right)^n z \\ & =\left(\sum_{k=0}^n C_n^k \frac{\partial^n}{\partial x^k \partial y^{n-k}} \mathrm{~d} x^k \mathrm{~d} y^{n-k}\right) z \end{aligned} dnz​=(∂x∂​ dx+∂y∂​ dy)nz=(k=0∑n​Cnk​∂xk∂yn−k∂n​ dxk dyn−k)z​

Taylor 公式与极值问题

  • 二元函数的 Taylor 公式：

    • 凸区域：若区域 DDD 中任意两点的连线都含于 DDD.
    • 微分中值定理：设 fff 在凸区域 DDD 中可微，则 ∃θ∈(0,1)\exists \theta \in(0,1)∃θ∈(0,1) ：

      f(x0+Δx,y0+Δy)−f(x0,y0)= fx(x0+θΔx,y0+θΔy)Δx+fy(x0+θΔx,y0+θΔy)Δy\begin{aligned} & f\left(x_0+\Delta x, y_0+\Delta y\right)-f\left(x_0, y_0\right) \\ = ~ & f_x\left(x_0+\theta \Delta x, y_0+\theta \Delta y\right) \Delta x+f_y\left(x_0+\theta \Delta x, y_0+\theta \Delta y\right) \Delta y \end{aligned} = ​f(x0​+Δx,y0​+Δy)−f(x0​,y0​)fx​(x0​+θΔx,y0​+θΔy)Δx+fy​(x0​+θΔx,y0​+θΔy)Δy​

    • Taylor 公式：设函数 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 U(P0(x0,y0))U\left(P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)\right)U(P0​(x0​,y0​)) 有 n+1n+1n+1 阶连续偏导数，则 ∃θ∈(0,1)\exists \theta \in(0,1)∃θ∈(0,1) ：

      f(x0+Δx,y0+Δy)=∑k=0n1k!(Δx∂∂x+Δy∂∂y)kf(x0,y0)+Rnf\left(x_0+\Delta x, y_0+\Delta y\right)=\sum_{k=0}^n \frac{1}{k!}\left(\Delta x \frac{\partial}{\partial x}+\Delta y \frac{\partial}{\partial y}\right)^k f\left(x_0, y_0\right)+R_n f(x0​+Δx,y0​+Δy)=k=0∑n​k!1​(Δx∂x∂​+Δy∂y∂​)kf(x0​,y0​)+Rn​

      其中 Lagrange 型余项

      Rn=1(n+1)!(Δx∂∂x+Δy∂∂y)n+1f(x0+θΔx,y0+θΔy)R_n=\frac{1}{(n+1)!}\left(\Delta x \frac{\partial}{\partial x}+\Delta y \frac{\partial}{\partial y}\right)^{n+1} f\left(x_0+\theta \Delta x, y_0+\theta \Delta y\right) Rn​=(n+1)!1​(Δx∂x∂​+Δy∂y∂​)n+1f(x0​+θΔx,y0​+θΔy)

  • 二元函数的极值：

    • 极值定义：若在点 P0(x0,y0)P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)P0​(x0​,y0​) 的某邻域内

      f(x,y)≤f(x0,y0)(or f(x,y)≥f(x0,y0))f(x, y) \leq f\left(x_0, y_0\right) \quad\left(\text {or } f(x, y) \geq f\left(x_0, y_0\right)\right) f(x,y)≤f(x0​,y0​)(or f(x,y)≥f(x0​,y0​))

      则称函数 fff 在 (x0,y0)\left(x_0, y_0\right)(x0​,y0​) 处取极大值（or 极小值），P0(x0,y0)P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)P0​(x0​,y0​) 称为函数的极大值点（or 极小值点）.
    • 极值的必要条件：若 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 可偏导，且在 P0(x0,y0)P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)P0​(x0​,y0​) 取极值，则

      fx(x0,y0)=0=fy(x0,y0)f_x\left(x_0, y_0\right)=0=f_y\left(x_0, y_0\right) fx​(x0​,y0​)=0=fy​(x0​,y0​)

      满足上式的点称为驻点.
      • 极值点与驻点：驻点未必是极值点，极值点未必是驻点，可偏导的极值点必是驻点
    • 极值的充分条件：设 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 U(P0(x0,y0))U\left(P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)\right)U(P0​(x0​,y0​)) 的二阶偏导数连续，且

      fx(x0,y0)=0,fy(x0,y0)=0,f_x\left(x_0, y_0\right)=0, f_y\left(x_0, y_0\right)=0, fx​(x0​,y0​)=0,fy​(x0​,y0​)=0,

      记 Hesse 矩阵 H=(fxxfxyfyxfyy)P0\boldsymbol{H}=\left(\begin{array}{cc}f_{x x} & f_{x y} \\ f_{y x} & f_{y y}\end{array}\right)_{P_0}H=(fxx​fyx​​fxy​fyy​​)P0​​
      • 若 H\boldsymbol{H}H 为正定矩阵，则 f(x0,y0)f\left(x_0, y_0\right)f(x0​,y0​) 为严格极小值；若 H\boldsymbol{H}H 为负定矩阵，则 f(x0,y0)f\left(x_0, y_0\right)f(x0​,y0​) 为严格极大值
      • 若 H\boldsymbol{H}H 为不定矩阵，则 f(x0,y0)f\left(x_0, y_0\right)f(x0​,y0​) 非极值.

隐函数存在定理

  • 一元隐函数：设函数 FFF 在 (x0,y0)\left(x_0, y_0\right)(x0​,y0​) 邻域内有连续偏导数，且

    F(x0,y0)=0,Fy(x0,y0)≠0F\left(x_0, y_0\right)=0, \quad F_y\left(x_0, y_0\right) \neq 0 F(x0​,y0​)=0,Fy​(x0​,y0​)=0

    则方程 F(x,y)=0F(x, y)=0F(x,y)=0 在 (x0,y0)\left(x_0, y_0\right)(x0​,y0​) 某邻域内可确定唯一连续可导隐函数 y=y(x)y=y(x)y=y(x) ，满足

    F(x,y(x))≡0(x∈U(x0)),y0=y(x0)F(x, y(x)) \equiv 0\left(x \in U\left(x_0\right)\right), y_0=y\left(x_0\right) F(x,y(x))≡0(x∈U(x0​)),y0​=y(x0​)

    和

    dy dx=−FxFy\frac{\mathrm{d} y}{\mathrm{~d} x}=-\frac{F_x}{F_y}  dxdy​=−Fy​Fx​​

  • 多元隐函数：设函数 FFF 在 (x0,y0,z0)\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right)(x0​,y0​,z0​) 邻域内有连续偏导数，且

    F(x0,y0,z0)=0,Fz(x0,y0,z0)≠0F\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right)=0, \quad F_z\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right) \neq 0 F(x0​,y0​,z0​)=0,Fz​(x0​,y0​,z0​)=0

    则方程 F(x,y,z)=0F(x, y, z)=0F(x,y,z)=0 在 (x0,y0,z0)\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right)(x0​,y0​,z0​) 邻域内可确定唯一的隐函数 z=f(x,y)z=f(x, y)z=f(x,y)，满足

    F(x,y,f(x,y))≡0,z0=f(x0,y0)F(x, y, f(x, y)) \equiv 0, \quad z_0=f\left(x_0, y_0\right) F(x,y,f(x,y))≡0,z0​=f(x0​,y0​)

    且有

    ∂z∂x=−FxFz,∂z∂y=−FyFz\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=-\frac{F_x}{F_z}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=-\frac{F_y}{F_z} ∂x∂z​=−Fz​Fx​​,∂y∂z​=−Fz​Fy​​

方向导数与梯度

  • 方向导数：

    • 定义：设 l0=(cos⁡α,cos⁡β)\boldsymbol{l}^0=(\cos \alpha, \cos \beta)l0=(cosα,cosβ)，函数 z=f(x,y)z=f(x, y)z=f(x,y) 在 (x0,y0)\left(x_0, y_0\right)(x0​,y0​) 处沿 l\boldsymbol{l}l 的方向导数定义为

      ∂f∂l∣(x0,y0)=lim⁡t→0f(x0+tcos⁡α,y0+tcos⁡β)−f(x0,y0)t\left.\frac{\partial f}{\partial l}\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)}=\lim _{t \rightarrow 0} \frac{f\left(x_0+t \cos \alpha, y_0+t \cos \beta\right)-f\left(x_0, y_0\right)}{t} ∂l∂f​​(x0​,y0​)​=t→0lim​tf(x0​+tcosα,y0​+tcosβ)−f(x0​,y0​)​

    • 充分条件和计算公式：z=f(x,y)z=f(x, y)z=f(x,y) 在 P0(x0,y0)P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)P0​(x0​,y0​) 可微， l0=(cos⁡α,cos⁡β)\boldsymbol{l}^0=(\cos \alpha, \cos \beta)l0=(cosα,cosβ)，则 fff 在 P0P_0P0​ 点存在方向导数，且

      ∂f∂l∣(x0,y0)=fx(x0,y0)cos⁡α+fy(x0,y0)cos⁡β\left.\frac{\partial f}{\partial \boldsymbol{l}}\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)}=f_x\left(x_0, y_0\right) \cos \alpha+f_y\left(x_0, y_0\right) \cos \beta ∂l∂f​​(x0​,y0​)​=fx​(x0​,y0​)cosα+fy​(x0​,y0​)cosβ

      • 方向导数、可微与可偏导：可微一定方向导数存在，方向导数存在一定可偏导，方向导数存在不一定极限存在，方向导数存在不一定连续

  • 梯度：

    • 定义：函数 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在点 P0(x0,y0)P_0\left(x_0, y_0\right)P0​(x0​,y0​) 的梯度定义为

      ∇f∣(x0,y0)=grad⁡f∣(x0,y0)=(fx(x0,y0),fy(x0,y0))\left.\nabla f\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)}=\left.\operatorname{grad} f\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)}=\left(f_x\left(x_0, y_0\right), f_y\left(x_0, y_0\right)\right) ∇f∣(x0​,y0​)​=gradf∣(x0​,y0​)​=(fx​(x0​,y0​),fy​(x0​,y0​))

      简记为 ∇f=(fx,fy)\nabla f=\left(f_x, f_y\right)∇f=(fx​,fy​).
    • 性质：梯度的方向是方向导数取最大值时的方向，其模就是方向导数的最大值.

多元微分学的几何应用

  • 空间曲线的切线及法平面：设空间曲线 Γ\GammaΓ 的参数方程

    x=x(t),y=y(t),z=z(t),x=x(t), y=y(t), z=z(t), x=x(t),y=y(t),z=z(t),

    M0(x0,y0,z0),M(x,y,z)M_0\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right), M(x, y, z)M0​(x0​,y0​,z0​),M(x,y,z) 是 Γ\GammaΓ 上的点，且 M0(x0,y0,z0),M(x,y,z)M_0\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right), M(x, y, z)M0​(x0​,y0​,z0​),M(x,y,z) 分别对应参数 t0,t0+Δtt_0, t_0+\Delta tt0​,t0​+Δt，则 M0M_0M0​ 处切向量

    τ=(x′(t0),y′(t0),z′(t0))\tau=\left(x^{\prime}\left(t_0\right), y^{\prime}\left(t_0\right), z^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)\right) τ=(x′(t0​),y′(t0​),z′(t0​))

    切线方程

    x−x0x′(t0)=y−y0y′(t0)=z−z0z′(t0)\frac{x-x_0}{x^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)}=\frac{y-y_0}{y^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)}=\frac{z-z_0}{z^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)} x′(t0​)x−x0​​=y′(t0​)y−y0​​=z′(t0​)z−z0​​

    法平面方程

    x′(t0)(x−x0)+y′(t0)(y−y0)+z′(t0)(z−z0)=0x^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)\left(x-x_0\right)+y^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)\left(y-y_0\right)+z^{\prime}\left(t_0\right)\left(z-z_0\right)=0 x′(t0​)(x−x0​)+y′(t0​)(y−y0​)+z′(t0​)(z−z0​)=0

  • 曲面的切平面与法线：设曲面 SSS 的方程 F(x,y,z)=0,M0(x0,y0,z0)∈SF(x, y, z)=0, M_0\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right) \in SF(x,y,z)=0,M0​(x0​,y0​,z0​)∈S，则 M0M_0M0​ 处曲面（切平面）的法向量

    ∇F(M0)=(Fx,Fy,Fz)∣M0\nabla F\left(M_0\right)=\left.\left(F_x, F_y, F_z\right)\right|_{M_0} ∇F(M0​)=(Fx​,Fy​,Fz​)∣M0​​

    切平面方程

    Fx(M0)(x−x0)+Fy(M0)(y−y0)+Fz(M0)(z−z0)=0F_x\left(M_0\right)\left(x-x_0\right)+F_y\left(M_0\right)\left(y-y_0\right)+F_z\left(M_0\right)\left(z-z_0\right)=0 Fx​(M0​)(x−x0​)+Fy​(M0​)(y−y0​)+Fz​(M0​)(z−z0​)=0

    法线方程

    x−x0Fx(M0)=y−y0Fy(M0)=z−z0Fz(M0)\frac{x-x_0}{F_x\left(M_0\right)}=\frac{y-y_0}{F_y\left(M_0\right)}=\frac{z-z_0}{F_z\left(M_0\right)} Fx​(M0​)x−x0​​=Fy​(M0​)y−y0​​=Fz​(M0​)z−z0​​

  • 平面曲线的切线：设函数 F(x,y)F(x, y)F(x,y) 有连续偏导数，则曲线 F(x,y)=0F(x, y)=0F(x,y)=0 在 (x0,y0)\left(x_0, y_0\right)(x0​,y0​) 处的切线方程

    Fx(x0,y0)(x−x0)+Fy(x0,y0)(y−y0)=0F_x\left(x_0, y_0\right)\left(x-x_0\right)+F_y\left(x_0, y_0\right)\left(y-y_0\right)=0 Fx​(x0​,y0​)(x−x0​)+Fy​(x0​,y0​)(y−y0​)=0

    法向量

    n=(Fx,Fy)∣(x0,y0)\boldsymbol{n}=\left.\left(F_x, F_y\right)\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)} n=(Fx​,Fy​)∣(x0​,y0​)​

    切向量

    τ=(Fy,−Fx)∣(x0,y0)\boldsymbol{\tau}=\left.\left(F_y,-F_x\right)\right|_{\left(x_0, y_0\right)} τ=(Fy​,−Fx​)∣(x0​,y0​)​

条件极值 – Lagrange 乘数法

  • 问题的提出：求目标函数

    u=f(x,y,z)u=f(x, y, z) u=f(x,y,z)

    在约束条件 φ(x,y,z)=0\varphi(x, y, z)=0φ(x,y,z)=0 下的极值.

  • Lagrange 乘数法：引进辅助函数（Lagrange 函数）

    L(x,y,z,λ)=f(x,y,z)+λφ(x,y,z)L(x, y, z, \lambda)=f(x, y, z)+\lambda \varphi(x, y, z) L(x,y,z,λ)=f(x,y,z)+λφ(x,y,z)

    从其无条件极值的必要条件

    {Lx=fx+λφx=0Ly=fy+λφy=0Lz=fz+λφz=0Lλ=φ(x,y,z)=0\left\{\begin{array}{l} L_x=f_x+\lambda \varphi_x=0 \\ L_y=f_y+\lambda \varphi_y=0 \\ L_z=f_z+\lambda \varphi_z=0 \\ L_\lambda=\varphi(x, y, z)=0 \end{array}\right. ⎩⎨⎧​Lx​=fx​+λφx​=0Ly​=fy​+λφy​=0Lz​=fz​+λφz​=0Lλ​=φ(x,y,z)=0​

    求出的 (x0,y0,z0)\left(x_0, y_0, z_0\right)(x0​,y0​,z0​) 是可能的条件极值点.

重积分

二重积分的概念和性质

  • 二重积分定义：设 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在可求面积有界闭集 D⊂[a,b]×[c,d]D \subset[a, b] \times[c, d]D⊂[a,b]×[c,d] 上定义. 令 f(x,y)=0,(x,y)∈[a,b]×[c,d]\Df(x, y)=0,(x, y) \in[a, b] \times[c, d] \backslash Df(x,y)=0,(x,y)∈[a,b]×[c,d]\D. 若对 [a,b]×[c,d][a, b] \times[c, d][a,b]×[c,d] 的 ∀\forall∀矩形分划 DijD_{i j}Dij​ 及 ∀(ξi,ηj)∈Dij,(i=1,2,⋯ ,n;j=1,2,⋯ ,m)\forall\left(\xi_i, \eta_j\right) \in D_{i j},(i=1,2, \cdots, n ; j=1,2, \cdots, m)∀(ξi​,ηj​)∈Dij​,(i=1,2,⋯,n;j=1,2,⋯,m) ，总有

    lim⁡∥T∥→0∑i=1n∑j=1mf(ξi,ηj)Δσij=I.\lim _{\|T\| \rightarrow 0} \sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m f\left(\xi_i, \eta_j\right) \Delta \sigma_{i j}=I. ∥T∥→0lim​i=1∑n​j=1∑m​f(ξi​,ηj​)Δσij​=I.

    其中 ∥T∥=max⁡1≤i≤n,1≤j≤m{diam⁡{Dij}}\displaystyle \|T\|=\max _{1 \leq i \leq n, 1 \leq j \leq m}\left\{\operatorname{diam}\left\{D_{i j}\right\}\right\}∥T∥=1≤i≤n,1≤j≤mmax​{diam{Dij​}} ，则称 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 DDD 上可积，III 称为 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 DDD 上的二重积分，记为 ∬Df(x,y)dσ\displaystyle \iint_D f(x, y) \mathrm{d} \sigma∬D​f(x,y)dσ，其中 ∬\displaystyle \iint∬ 为积分号，DDD 为积分区域，f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 为被积函数，dσ\mathrm{d} \sigmadσ 为面积元素，∑i=1n∑j=1mf(ξi,ηj)Δσij\displaystyle \sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m f\left(\xi_i, \eta_j\right) \Delta \sigma_{i j}i=1∑n​j=1∑m​f(ξi​,ηj​)Δσij​ 称为 Riemann 和.

二重积分的计算

  • 二次积分：

    • 定义：设 f:[a,b]×[c,d]→Rf:[a, b] \times[c, d] \rightarrow \mathbf{R}f:[a,b]×[c,d]→R. 固定 x∈[a,b]x \in[a, b]x∈[a,b]，若存在首次积分 φ(x)=∫cdf(x,y)dy\displaystyle \varphi(x)=\int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} yφ(x)=∫cd​f(x,y)dy，且 φ\varphiφ 在 [a,b][a, b][a,b] 可积，则称

      ∫abφ(x)dx=∫ab(∫cdf(x,y)dy)dx\int_a^b \varphi(x) \mathrm{d} x=\int_a^b\left(\int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} y\right) \mathrm{d} x ∫ab​φ(x)dx=∫ab​(∫cd​f(x,y)dy)dx

      为 fff 在 [a,b]×[c,d][a, b] \times[c, d][a,b]×[c,d] 上先 yyy 后 xxx 的累次（二次）积分，也记为

      ∫ab dx∫cdf(x,y)dy\int_a^b \mathrm{~d} x \int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} y ∫ab​ dx∫cd​f(x,y)dy

    • 二次积分与二重积分：二重积分存在不能导出二次积分存在，二次积分存在不能导出二重积分存在

  • 化二重积分为二次积分：

    • 定理：设 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 [a,b]×[c,d][a, b] \times[c, d][a,b]×[c,d] 可积，且 ∀x∈[a,b]\forall x \in[a, b]∀x∈[a,b]，存在首次积分 F(x)=∫cdf(x,y)dy\displaystyle F(x)=\int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} yF(x)=∫cd​f(x,y)dy，则

      ∬[a,b]×[c,d]f(x,y)dσ=∫ab dx∫cdf(x,y)dy\iint_{[a, b] \times [c, d]} f(x, y) \mathrm{d} \sigma=\int_a^b \mathrm{~d} x \int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} y ∬[a,b]×[c,d]​f(x,y)dσ=∫ab​ dx∫cd​f(x,y)dy

    • 推论 1：若 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 在 [a,b]×[c,d][a, b] \times[c, d][a,b]×[c,d] 连续，则有

      ∬[a,b]×(c,d]f(x,y)dσ=∫ab dx∫cdf(x,y)dy=∫cd dy∫abf(x,y)dx\iint_{[a, b] \times(c, d]} f(x, y) \mathrm{d} \sigma=\int_a^b \mathrm{~d} x \int_c^d f(x, y) \mathrm{d} y=\int_c^d \mathrm{~d} y \int_a^b f(x, y) \mathrm{d} x ∬[a,b]×(c,d]​f(x,y)dσ=∫ab​ dx∫cd​f(x,y)dy=∫cd​ dy∫ab​f(x,y)dx

    • 推论 2：若 fff 在 xxx 型区域 D={(x,y)∣a≤x≤b,y1(x)≤y≤y2(x)}D=\left\{(x, y) \mid a \leq x \leq b, y_1(x) \leq y \leq y_2(x)\right\}D={(x,y)∣a≤x≤b,y1​(x)≤y≤y2​(x)} 连续，则有

      ∬Df(x,y)dx dy=∫ab dx∫y1(x)y2(x)f(x,y)dy\iint_D f(x, y) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y=\int_a^b \mathrm{~d} x \int_{y_1(x)}^{y_2(x)} f(x, y) \mathrm{d} y ∬D​f(x,y)dx dy=∫ab​ dx∫y1​(x)y2​(x)​f(x,y)dy

    • 面积元素：dσ=dx dy\mathrm{d} \sigma=\mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} ydσ=dx dy

  • 极坐标计算二重积分：从直角坐标到极坐标时的二重积分变换公式

    ∬Df(x,y)dx dy=∬D′f(rcos⁡θ,rsin⁡θ)r dr dθ\iint_D f(x, y) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y=\iint_{D^{\prime}} f(r \cos \theta, r \sin \theta) r \mathrm{~d} r \mathrm{~d} \theta ∬D​f(x,y)dx dy=∬D′​f(rcosθ,rsinθ)r dr dθ

    其中 D′D^{\prime}D′ 是 DDD 在极坐标下的表示形式. 特别地，若

    D′={(r,θ)∣α≤θ≤β,r1(θ)≤r≤r2(θ)}D^{\prime}=\left\{(r, \theta) \mid \alpha \leq \theta \leq \beta, r_1(\theta) \leq r \leq r_2(\theta)\right\} D′={(r,θ)∣α≤θ≤β,r1​(θ)≤r≤r2​(θ)}

    则有

    ∬D′f(rcos⁡θ,rsin⁡θ)r dr dθ=∫αβdθ∫r1(θ)r2(θ)f(rcos⁡θ,rsin⁡θ)r dr\begin{aligned} & \iint_{D^{\prime}} f(r \cos \theta, r \sin \theta) r \mathrm{~d} r \mathrm{~d} \theta \\ = & \int_\alpha^\beta \mathrm{d} \theta \int_{r_1(\theta)}^{r_2(\theta)} f(r \cos \theta, r \sin \theta) r \mathrm{~d} r \end{aligned} =​∬D′​f(rcosθ,rsinθ)r dr dθ∫αβ​dθ∫r1​(θ)r2​(θ)​f(rcosθ,rsinθ)r dr​

    • 面积元素：dσ=r dr dθ\mathrm{d} \sigma=r \mathrm{~d} r \mathrm{~d} \thetadσ=r dr dθ

  • 二重积分的变量代换：设变换 T:{x=x(u,v)y=y(u,v)T:\left\{\begin{array}{l}x=x(u, v) \\ y=y(u, v)\end{array}\right.T:{x=x(u,v)y=y(u,v)​ 有连续偏导数，且满足 J=∂(x,y)∂(u,v)=∣xuxvyuyv∣≠0\displaystyle J=\frac{\partial(x, y)}{\partial(u, v)}=\left|\begin{array}{ll}x_u & x_v \\ y_u & y_v\end{array}\right| \neq 0J=∂(u,v)∂(x,y)​=​xu​yu​​xv​yv​​​=0，又 f(x,y)∈C(D)f(x, y) \in C(D)f(x,y)∈C(D)，则

    ∬Df(x,y)dx dy=∬D′f(x(u,v),y(u,v))∣J∣du dv\iint_D f(x, y) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y=\iint_{D^{\prime}} f(x(u, v), y(u, v))|J| \mathrm{d} u \mathrm{~d} v ∬D​f(x,y)dx dy=∬D′​f(x(u,v),y(u,v))∣J∣du dv

    其中 TTT 将 D′D^{\prime}D′ 变为 DDD.

三重积分

  • 三重积分的概念和性质：设 f(x,y,z)f(x, y, z)f(x,y,z) 在可求积有界闭域 Ω⊂[a,b]×[c,d]×[e,h](:=V)\Omega \subset[a, b] \times [c, d] \times[e, h](:=V)Ω⊂[a,b]×[c,d]×[e,h](:=V) 定义. 令 f(x,y,z)=0,(x,y,z)∈V\Ωf(x, y, z)=0,(x, y, z) \in V \backslash \Omegaf(x,y,z)=0,(x,y,z)∈V\Ω. 若对 VVV 的 ∀\forall∀ 长方体分划 VijkV_{i j k}Vijk​ 及 ∀(ξi,ηj,ζk)∈Vijk\forall\left(\xi_i, \eta_j, \zeta_k\right) \in V_{i j k}∀(ξi​,ηj​,ζk​)∈Vijk​，总有

    lim⁡λ→0∑i=1l∑j=1m∑k=1nf(ξi,ηj,ζk)ΔVijk=I,\lim _{\lambda \rightarrow 0} \sum_{i=1}^l \sum_{j=1}^m \sum_{k=1}^n f\left(\xi_i, \eta_j, \zeta_k\right) \Delta V_{i j k}=I, λ→0lim​i=1∑l​j=1∑m​k=1∑n​f(ξi​,ηj​,ζk​)ΔVijk​=I,

    其中 ΔVijk=Vol⁡(Vijk),λ=max⁡1≤i≤1,1≤j≤m,1≤k≤n{diam⁡{Vijk}}\displaystyle \Delta V_{i j k}=\operatorname{Vol}\left(V_{i j k}\right), \lambda=\max _{1 \leq i \leq 1,1 \leq j \leq m, 1 \leq k \leq n}\left\{\operatorname{diam}\left\{V_{i j k}\right\}\right\}ΔVijk​=Vol(Vijk​),λ=1≤i≤1,1≤j≤m,1≤k≤nmax​{diam{Vijk​}}，则称 f(x,y,z)f(x, y, z)f(x,y,z) 在 Ω\OmegaΩ 上可积，称为 fff 在 Ω\OmegaΩ 上的三重积分，记为 ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dV\displaystyle \iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} V∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dV，dV\mathrm{d} VdV 称为体积元素.

  • 直角坐标计算三重积分：

    • 体积微元：dV=dx dy dz\mathrm{d} V=\mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \mathrm{~d} zdV=dx dy dz
    • 柱线法(坐标面投影法)：设 Ω\OmegaΩ 是以曲面 z=z1(x,y)z=z_1(x, y)z=z1​(x,y) 为底，曲面 z=z2(x,y)z=z_2(x, y)z=z2​(x,y) 为顶，而侧面是母线平行 zzz 轴的柱面所围成区域. 又 Ω\OmegaΩ 在 xyx yxy上的投影区域为 DDD，则 Ω\OmegaΩ 可表示为

      {(x,y,z)∣z1(x,y)≤z≤z2(x,y),(x,y)∈D}\left\{(x, y, z) \mid z_1(x, y) \leq z \leq z_2(x, y),(x, y) \in D\right\} {(x,y,z)∣z1​(x,y)≤z≤z2​(x,y),(x,y)∈D}

      设 D={(x,y)∣a≤x≤b,y1(x)≤y≤y2(x)}D=\left\{(x, y) \mid a \leq x \leq b, y_1(x) \leq y \leq y_2(x)\right\}D={(x,y)∣a≤x≤b,y1​(x)≤y≤y2​(x)}，从而
      ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dx dy dz=∬D(∫z1(x,y)z2(x,y)f(x,y,z)dz)dx dy= def  ∬D dx dy∫z1(x,y)z2(x,y)f(x,y,z)dz= ∫ab dx∫y1(x)y2(x)dy∫z1(x,y)z2(x,y)f(x,y,z)dz\begin{aligned} & \iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \mathrm{~d} z=\iint_D\left(\int_{z_1(x, y)}^{z_2(x, y)} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} z\right) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \\ \stackrel{\text { def }}{=} ~&\iint_D \mathrm{~d} x \mathrm{~d} y \int_{z_1(x, y)}^{z_2(x, y)} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} z \\ = ~& \int_a^b \mathrm{~d} x \int_{y_1(x)}^{y_2(x)} \mathrm{d} y \int_{z_1(x, y)}^{z_2(x, y)} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} z \\\end{aligned}= def  = ​∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dx dy dz=∬D​(∫z1​(x,y)z2​(x,y)​f(x,y,z)dz)dx dy∬D​ dx dy∫z1​(x,y)z2​(x,y)​f(x,y,z)dz∫ab​ dx∫y1​(x)y2​(x)​dy∫z1​(x,y)z2​(x,y)​f(x,y,z)dz​
    • 截面法(坐标轴投影法)：设区域 Ω\OmegaΩ 在 zzz 轴上投影区间为 [h1,h2]\left[h_1, h_2\right][h1​,h2​]，即 Ω\OmegaΩ 介于平面 z=h1z=h_1z=h1​ 与 z=h2z=h_2z=h2​ 之间，过 zzz 处且垂直 zzz 轴的平面截 Ω\OmegaΩ得截面区域 DzD_zDz​，则 Ω\OmegaΩ 可表示为

      Ω={(x,y,z)∣h1≤z≤h2,(x,y)∈Dz}\Omega=\left\{(x, y, z) \mid h_1 \leq z \leq h_2,(x, y) \in D_z\right\} Ω={(x,y,z)∣h1​≤z≤h2​,(x,y)∈Dz​}

      从而

      ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dx dy dz=∫h1h2(∬Dzf(x,y,z)dx dy)dz=∫h1h2 dz∬Dzf(x,y,z)dx dy\begin{aligned} \iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \mathrm{~d} z & =\int_{h_1}^{h_2}\left(\iint_{D_z} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y\right) \mathrm{d} z \\ & =\int_{h_1}^{h_2} \mathrm{~d} z \iint_{D_z} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \end{aligned} ∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dx dy dz​=∫h1​h2​​(∬Dz​​f(x,y,z)dx dy)dz=∫h1​h2​​ dz∬Dz​​f(x,y,z)dx dy​

  • 三重积分的变量代换：

    • 变量代换：设变换 T:{x=x(u,v,w)y=y(u,v,w)z=z(u,v,w)T:\left\{\begin{array}{l}x=x(u, v, w) \\ y=y(u, v, w) \\ z=z(u, v, w)\end{array}\right.T:⎩⎨⎧​x=x(u,v,w)y=y(u,v,w)z=z(u,v,w)​ 有连续偏导数，且满足 J=∂(x,y,z)∂(u,v,w)=∣xuxvxwyuyvywzuzvzw∣≠0\displaystyle J=\frac{\partial(x, y, z)}{\partial(u, v, w)}=\left|\begin{array}{lll} x_u & x_v & x_w \\ y_u & y_v & y_w \\ z_u & z_v & z_w \end{array}\right| \neq 0J=∂(u,v,w)∂(x,y,z)​=​xu​yu​zu​​xv​yv​zv​​xw​yw​zw​​​=0，又 f(x,y,z)∈C(Ω)f(x, y, z) \in C(\Omega)f(x,y,z)∈C(Ω)， 则

      ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dx dy dz=∭Ω′f(x(u,v,w),y(u,v,w),z(u,v,w))∣J∣du dv dw.\iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} x \mathrm{~d} y \mathrm{~d} z=\iiint_{\Omega^{\prime}} f(x(u, v, w), y(u, v, w), z(u, v, w))|J| \mathrm{d} u \mathrm{~d} v \mathrm{~d} w . ∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dx dy dz=∭Ω′​f(x(u,v,w),y(u,v,w),z(u,v,w))∣J∣du dv dw.

      其中 TTT 将 Ω′\Omega^{\prime}Ω′ 变为 Ω\OmegaΩ
    • 柱面坐标系：此坐标系实乃 x,yx, yx,y 坐标转变为极坐标，其变换公式为

      {x=rcos⁡θy=rsin⁡θz=z\left\{\begin{array}{l} x=r \cos \theta \\ y=r \sin \theta \\ z=z \end{array}\right. ⎩⎨⎧​x=rcosθy=rsinθz=z​

      由 ∂(x,y,z)∂(r,θ,z)=∣cos⁡θ−rsin⁡θ0sin⁡θrcos⁡θ0001∣=r\displaystyle \frac{\partial(x, y, z)}{\partial(r, \theta, z)}=\left|\begin{array}{ccc}\cos \theta & -r \sin \theta & 0 \\ \sin \theta & r \cos \theta & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1\end{array}\right|=r∂(r,θ,z)∂(x,y,z)​=​cosθsinθ0​−rsinθrcosθ0​001​​=r，得到柱面坐标积分公式

      ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dV=∭Ω′f(rcos⁡θ,rsin⁡θ,z)r dr dθ dz\iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} V=\iiint_{\Omega^{\prime}} f(r \cos \theta, r \sin \theta, z) r \mathrm{~d} r \mathrm{~d} \theta \mathrm{~d} z ∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dV=∭Ω′​f(rcosθ,rsinθ,z)r dr dθ dz

      其中 Ω′\Omega^{\prime}Ω′ 是 Ω\OmegaΩ 在柱面坐标系下的表示形式.
      • 体积微元： dV=r dr dθ dz\mathrm{~d} V = r \mathrm{~d} r \mathrm{~d} \theta \mathrm{~d} z dV=r dr dθ dz
    • 球面坐标系：设 M(x,y,z)M(x, y, z)M(x,y,z) 是空间一点，引进球面坐标 (ρ,φ,θ)(\rho, \varphi, \theta)(ρ,φ,θ)，坐标变换关系式

      {x=ρsin⁡φcos⁡θy=ρsin⁡φsin⁡θz=ρcos⁡φ\left\{\begin{array}{l} x=\rho \sin \varphi \cos \theta \\ y=\rho \sin \varphi \sin \theta \\ z=\rho \cos \varphi \end{array}\right. ⎩⎨⎧​x=ρsinφcosθy=ρsinφsinθz=ρcosφ​

      由于 Jacobi 行列式

      ∂(x,y,z)∂(ρ,φ,θ)=∣sin⁡φcos⁡θρcos⁡φcos⁡θ−ρsin⁡φsin⁡θsin⁡φsin⁡θρcos⁡φsin⁡θρsin⁡φcos⁡θcos⁡φ−ρsin⁡φ0∣=ρ2sin⁡φ\frac{\partial(x, y, z)}{\partial(\rho, \varphi, \theta)}=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} \sin \varphi \cos \theta & \rho \cos \varphi \cos \theta & -\rho \sin \varphi \sin \theta \\ \sin \varphi \sin \theta & \rho \cos \varphi \sin \theta & \rho \sin \varphi \cos \theta \\ \cos \varphi & -\rho \sin \varphi & 0 \end{array}\right|=\rho^2 \sin \varphi ∂(ρ,φ,θ)∂(x,y,z)​=​sinφcosθsinφsinθcosφ​ρcosφcosθρcosφsinθ−ρsinφ​−ρsinφsinθρsinφcosθ0​​=ρ2sinφ

      导出

      ∭Ωf(x,y,z)dV=∭Ω′f(ρsin⁡φcos⁡θ,ρsin⁡φsin⁡θ,ρcos⁡φ)ρ2sin⁡φ dρ dφ dθ\iiint_{\Omega} f(x, y, z) \mathrm{d} V = \iiint_{\Omega^{\prime}} f(\rho \sin \varphi \cos \theta, \rho \sin \varphi \sin \theta, \rho \cos \varphi) \rho^2 \sin \varphi \mathrm{~d} \rho \mathrm{~d} \varphi \mathrm{~d} \theta ∭Ω​f(x,y,z)dV=∭Ω′​f(ρsinφcosθ,ρsinφsinθ,ρcosφ)ρ2sinφ dρ dφ dθ

      其中 Ω′\Omega^{\prime}Ω′ 是 Ω\OmegaΩ 在球面坐标系下的表示形式.
      • 体积微元：dV=ρ2sin⁡φ dρ dφ dθ\mathrm{d} V=\rho^2 \sin \varphi \mathrm{~d} \rho \mathrm{~d} \varphi \mathrm{~d} \thetadV=ρ2sinφ dρ dφ dθ

第一类线面积分

第一类曲线积分

  • 概念与性质：
    • 定义：

      ∫Cf(x,y)ds=lim⁡λ→0∑i=1nf(ξi,ηi)Δsi\int_C f(x, y) \mathrm{d} s=\lim _{\lambda \rightarrow 0} \sum_{i=1}^n f\left(\xi_i, \eta_i\right) \Delta s_i ∫C​f(x,y)ds=λ→0lim​i=1∑n​f(ξi​,ηi​)Δsi​

    • 性质：与曲线方向无关、线性性、可加性
